prompt: Resolve the field tradeoff: distinguish common shortcuts from acceptable journeyman practice.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: protecting downstream vs. single-location wiring. The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 210.12.
title: Judgment call: GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting (service call)
